slides.heading: INguquko Yezimboni eBrithani NaseNingizimu ye-Afrika
slides.lead: Indlela isitimu, izimboni namadolobha aguqula ngayo iBrithani - nendlela lolo hlobo lwenguquko olwafinyelela ngayo eNingizimu ye-Afrika.

image.alt: Imboni enezimbhobho zentuthu ezinde eduze kwesitimela sesitimu, ngaphansi kwesibhakabhaka esiwolintshi esinentuthu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='40' y='70' width='90' height='58' fill='#5a4a37'/><rect x='58' y='30' width='16' height='40' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='92' y='38' width='16' height='32' fill='#3f342a'/><circle cx='66' cy='24' r='12' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='100' cy='30' r='10' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='170' y='96' width='96' height='32' rx='5' fill='#7a1f1f'/><rect x='176' y='78' width='30' height='20' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='188' cy='132' r='12' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='248' cy='132' r='12' fill='#2f2a24'/><rect x='150' y='124' width='120' height='6' fill='#4a4033'/><circle cx='262' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokubuza abafundi ukuthi yimiphi imishini nezinto ezenza impilo ibe lula abazisebenzisa nsuku zonke ezidinga izimboni, ugesi noma uphethiloli ukuze zibe khona. Chaza izingxenye ezimbili zalesi sihloko: kuqala iNguquko Yezimboni eyaqala eBrithani, bese kuba yindlela isidingo sezimpahla eziluhlaza, izimakethe nabasebenzi esadonsa ngayo iNingizimu ye-Afrika ukuba ingene emhlabeni ofanayo wezimboni - ikakhulukazi ngamadayimane negolide. Chaza igama elithi 'inguquko' njengoshintsho olusheshayo, olujulile endleleni abantu abaphila futhi abasebenza ngayo.

slides.heading: Yayiyini INguquko Yezimboni?
slides.lead: Kusukela cishe ngeminyaka yawo-1760, iBrithani yaguquka isuka ekwenzeni izimpahla ngezandla iya ekuzenzeni ngemishini ezimbonini.

blocks.text: I-**Nguquko Yezimboni** kwakuyisikhathi, esaqala eBrithani maphakathi nawo-1700, lapho imishini emisha nemithombo emisha yamandla yenza abantu bakwazi ukukhiqiza izimpahla ngokushesha okukhulu nangobuningi obukhulu kunangaphambili. Umsebenzi wasuka emakhaya nasezindaweni ezincane zokusebenzela wangena **ezimbonini** ezinkulu.

items: Ngaphambili: iningi labantu lalilima umhlaba futhi lenza izimpahla ngezandla ekhaya.
Emva kwalokho: abantu abaningi babesebenza imishini ezimbonini emadolobhaneni nasemadolobheni.
IBrithani yayihamba phambili ngoba yayinamalahle, insimbi, imali yokutshala nezindlela zokuhweba kuwo wonke umbuso wayo.

slides.notes: Gcizelela ukuqhubeka nokushintsha. Abantu babelokhu benza indwangu, amathuluzi nobumba - kodwa ngezandla nangobuningi obuncane. Inguquko yayisebukhulwini nasejubaneni. Ethula umqondo wokuthi ukuqala kwaseBrithani phambili kwakuncike ngokwengxenye emcebweni nasezimpahleni eziluhlaza ezazithathwa emakoloni ayo aphesheya kwezilwandle, okuba kubalulekile lapho sifika eNingizimu ye-Afrika.

slides.heading: Amandla esitimu
slides.lead: Injini yesitimu yanika izimboni umthombo wamandla onamandla, othembekile ongancikile emifuleni noma emoyeni.

blocks.text: Imishini yasekuqaleni yayiqhutshwa amasondo amanzi, ngakho izimboni kwakudingeka zakhiwe eduze kwemifula esheshayo. Ngeminyaka yawo-1760 nawo-1770 unjiniyela waseScotland u-**James Watt** wayithuthukisa kakhulu **injini yesitimu**, eyayishisa amalahle ukuze ibilise amanzi futhi iqhube imishini. Manje imboni yayingakhiwa cishe noma kuphi.

items: Izinjini zesitimu zazimpompa amanzi ziwakhiphe ezimayini ezijulile zamalahle nezinsimbi.
Zaziqhuba imishini yokuphotha neyokweluka ezimbonini zezindwangu.
Kamuva zaqhuba izitimela nemikhumbi, zithutha izimpahla nabantu ngokushesha.

image.alt: Iboyilari yenjini yesitimu enepistoni nesondo elikhulu eliphenduka, kunyuka isitimu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect x='30' y='78' width='70' height='48' rx='6' fill='#6b3a2e'/><rect x='40' y='60' width='14' height='18' fill='#4a281f'/><circle cx='47' cy='52' r='9' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.85'/><circle cx='58' cy='42' r='7' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='100' y='96' width='36' height='10' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='168' cy='101' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#3f342a' stroke-width='8'/><circle cx='168' cy='101' r='6' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='30' y='126' width='150' height='8' fill='#4a4033'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcina isayensi ilula: shisisa amanzi abe yisitimu, isitimu siphushe ipistoni, ipistoni liphenduse isondo eliqhuba imishini. Inkululeko ebalulekile eyanikwa yinjini ka-Watt kwakuyindawo - izimboni zazingasadingi ukuba zibe seduze komfula. Xhumanisa naphambili: amalahle, uphethiloli owawondla injini yesitimu, aba omunye wezimboni ezakhula ngokushesha kunazo zonke.

slides.heading: Uhlelo lwezimboni
slides.lead: Imishini, abasebenzi namahora amisiwe kwahlanganiswa ndawonye ngaphansi kophahla olulodwa.

blocks.heading: Imishini
blocks.text: Imishini emikhulu enamandla yenza ngemizuzu lokho okwakuthatha isisebenzi amahora kwenziwa ngesandla.

blocks.heading: Iwashi
blocks.text: Abasebenzi kwakudingeka bafike ngesikhathi futhi basebenze amashifthi amade, amisiwe abekwa insimbi yefektri.

blocks.heading: Amaholo
blocks.text: Abantu babengasakwenzi izimpahla eziphelele; babeholelwa ukwenza umsebenzi owodwa omncane usuku lonke.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lawa makhadi amathathu ukuchaza okwakusha ngomsebenzi wasezimbonini: ukuziphatha ngokwewashi, ukuhlukaniswa komsebenzi ube yimisebenzi emincane ephindaphindwayo, kanye nokuncika eholweni kunomhlaba noma ubuciko. Cela abafundi baqhathanise lokhu nendlela umsebenzi owawuhlelwe ngayo ngaphambili - ekhaya, ngesivinini somndeni. Lokhu kubeka izindleko zabantu esilaydini esilandelayo.

slides.heading: Amalahle, insimbi nezitimela
slides.lead: Izimboni ezintsha nezokuthutha ezintsha zazondlana futhi zasakazeka kulo lonke elaseBrithani.

blocks.text: Izinjini zesitimu zazidinga **amalahle**, imishini nojantshi bezitimela benziwe nge-**nsimbi** kamuva ngensimbi eqinile (isitili), futhi **izitimela** zesitimu zazikuthutha konke ngokushesha ezweni lonke. Ngo-1830 kwavulwa uJantshi WaseLiverpool NaseManchester (Liverpool and Manchester Railway), okwabonisa ukuthi abantu nezimpahla base bengahamba ngokushesha kangakanani manje.

items: Ukumbiwa kwamalahle nokwenziwa kwensimbi kwakhula kwaba yizimboni ezinkulukazi.
Izitimela nemisele yamanzi kuxhume izimayini, izimboni, amadolobha namachweba.
Imikhumbi yesitimu yayithutha izimpahla zaseBrithani - futhi ilethe izimpahla eziluhlaza - kuwo wonke umbuso.

image.alt: Isitimela sesitimu kojantshi sidonsa izinqola zamalahle sidlula isignali.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='30' y='70' width='60' height='42' rx='5' fill='#7a1f1f'/><rect x='36' y='52' width='16' height='18' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='44' cy='44' r='9' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='96' y='84' width='40' height='28' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='142' y='84' width='40' height='28' fill='#3f342a'/><circle cx='46' cy='116' r='9' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='78' cy='116' r='9' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='112' cy='116' r='8' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='158' cy='116' r='8' fill='#2f2a24'/><rect x='20' y='124' width='200' height='5' fill='#4a4033'/><rect x='206' y='70' width='6' height='42' fill='#5a4a37'/><circle cx='209' cy='72' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bonisa uketshezi lokusabela: isitimu sidinga amalahle, imishini nojantshi kudinga insimbi, izitimela zithutha kokubili futhi zivula izimakethe ezintsha. Yingakho izazi-mlando zikubiza ngokuthi 'inguquko' - olunye ushintsho luvusa olunye. Gqamisa ukuxhumana nombuso (imikhumbi yesitimu nokuhweba) ngoba kuxhumana ngqo nesizathu esenza iBrithani yanaba yangena ezindaweni ezifana neNingizimu ye-Afrika.

slides.heading: Ukuthuthela emadolobheni: ukukhula kwamadolobha
slides.lead: Izimboni zadonsa izinombolo ezinkulu zabantu zisuka emaphandleni ziya emadolobhaneni akhula ngokushesha.

blocks.text: **Ukuthuthela emadolobheni** kusho ukukhula kwamadolobhana namadolobha njengoba abantu bethuthela kuwo. Njengoba izimboni zivulwa, imindeni yashiya amapulazi iyofuna umsebenzi, futhi amadolobha afana neManchester neBirmingham akhula ngokushesha okukhulu. Izindlu, amanzi nokuthuthwa kwendle ngokuvamile kwakungakwazi ukugcina.

items: Abasebenzi baminyana ezindlini ezishibhile, eziminyene eduze kwezimboni.
Ukuminyana nokungabikho kwenhlanzeko okwanele kwasakaza izifo.
Okokuqala ngqa, amazwe amaningi ayenabantu abaningi abahlala emadolobheni kunabahlala emhlabeni.

image.alt: Imigqa yezindlu ezincane eziminyene ezinezimbhobho zentuthu ezihlanganiswe ndawonye ngokuqinile.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='126' width='240' height='34' fill='#8c7a5c'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='16' y='78' width='34' height='48'/><rect x='54' y='70' width='34' height='56'/><rect x='92' y='80' width='34' height='46'/><rect x='130' y='68' width='34' height='58'/><rect x='168' y='82' width='34' height='44'/><rect x='206' y='74' width='28' height='52'/></g><g fill='#3f342a'><rect x='24' y='60' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='62' y='52' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='138' y='50' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='176' y='64' width='7' height='18'/></g><g fill='#cdd6b5'><rect x='26' y='92' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='64' y='86' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='102' y='94' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='140' y='84' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='178' y='96' width='12' height='14'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthuthela emadolobheni ngokucacile ngoba kuyigama elibalulekile le-CAPS futhi liyabuya lapho sibheka iNingizimu Afrika. Linganisa isithombe: amadolobha ayenikeza umsebenzi namaholo, kodwa amadolobha okuqala ezimboni ayeminyene futhi engenampilo. Buza abafundi ukuthi idolobha labo noma idolobha eliseduze lakhula yini ngenxa yemisebenzi - xhumanisa umqondo nomhlaba wabo.

slides.heading: Ushintsho lwenhlalo nezimo zokusebenza
slides.lead: Inguquko yadala umcebo omkhulu kwabanye kanye nomsebenzi onzima, oyingozi kwabaningi.

blocks.text: Abanikazi bezimboni nabahwebi baba nothile, kwavela **isigaba esimaphakathi** esisha. Kodwa abasebenzi abaningi - kufaka phakathi abesifazane nezingane - basebenza amahora amade ezimbonini eziyingozi nasezimayini ngeholo eliphansi. Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, abasebenzi bakha **izinyunyana zabasebenzi** futhi bakhankasela imithetho ezobavikela.

items: Izingane zazisebenza ezimbonini nasezimayini, futhi eziningi zalimala. [SME] Qinisekisa noma yimaphi aminyaka ethile noma izibalo ngaphambi kokuzisebenzisa.
Abaguquli banqoba imithetho ekhawulela amahora okusebenza nokusetshenziswa kwezingane.
Umphakathi wahlukana ngokusobala kakhulu waba yisigaba esinothile esinempahla nesigaba sabasebenzi.

image.alt: Isikali esikala isikhwama sezinhlamvu zemali kumelene nesithombe sesisebenzi, sibonisa ukungalingani.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect x='106' y='30' width='8' height='96' fill='#5a4a37'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='80' height='6' fill='#5a4a37'/><line x1='78' y1='36' x2='78' y2='70' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='142' y1='36' x2='142' y2='58' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='78' cy='80' r='16' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='78' y='85' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3a10'>R</text><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='142' cy='66' r='8'/><rect x='136' y='74' width='12' height='20'/></g><rect x='70' y='126' width='80' height='6' fill='#4a4033'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha lokhu ngokunesibopho: iphuzu ukuthi ukwakheka kwezimboni kwaletha inqubekela phambili nobunzima ngesikhathi esisodwa. Gcizelela imbangela nomphumela - izimo ezimbi zaholela abasebenzi ukuba bakhe izinyunyana futhi baphokophele imithetho yezinguquko. Ifulege le-[SME] limaka imininingwane yokusetshenziswa kwezingane: kugcine kujwayelekile ngaphandle uma umbuyekezi enikeza aminyaka noma izibalo eziqinisekisiwe. Lo mqondo wesigaba esinothile esinempahla nesigaba sabasebenzi udlulela ngqo ezimayini zaseNingizimu Afrika.

slides.heading: Izinto ezasungulwa noshintsho eBrithani

blocks.alt: Ushwibeka lwesikhathi lwezinto ezibalulekile ezasungulwa zeNguquko Yezimboni kusukela ngawo-1760 kuya ku-1840.

events.label: U-James Watt uthola ilungelo lobunikazi lwenjini yakhe yesitimu ethuthukisiwe
I-power loom yenza ukweluka kusebenze ngemishini
Ujantshi wesitimu wokuqala womphakathi (Stockton kuya eDarlington)
IBrithani ingamandla ahamba phambili ezimbonini emhlabeni

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lolu shwibeka lwesikhathi ukuhlanganisa ingxenye yaseBrithani yalesi sihloko ngaphambi kokuwelela eNingizimu ye-Afrika. Cela abafundi baqaphele iphethini: imishini yezindwangu kuqala, bese kuba amandla esitimu, bese kuba izitimela ezithutha yonke into. Qaphela ukuthi lezi zinsuku ziyizikhathi zoshintsho ezilinganiselwe, hhayi kuphela izehlakalo ezibalulekile. [SME] Umbuyekezi kufanele aqinisekise izinsuku ezingqo ngokweshwibeka lwezinto ezasungulwa lwe-SAHO ngaphambi kokuphrinta.

slides.heading: Kungani inguquko yafinyelela eNingizimu ye-Afrika
slides.lead: IBrithani yezimboni yayidinga izimpahla eziluhlaza, izimakethe ezintsha nabasebenzi abashibhile - futhi yabheka emakoloni ayo.

blocks.text: Izimboni zaseBrithani zazidinga **izimpahla eziluhlaza** ezifana nekotoni, uboya nezinsimbi, futhi abahwebi bayo babefuna **izimakethe ezintsha** zokudayisa izimpahla eseziqedwe. Lokhu kwaqhuba iBrithani ukuba yandise umbuso wayo, kufaka phakathi eNingizimu ye-Afrika. Lapho kutholakala amadayimane bese kuba yigolide lapha, lokho kudonsa kwaba namandla kakhulu.

items: Umnotho wezimboni wawudinga izimpahla amakoloni ayengazihlinzeka.
Imali nemishini yaseBrithani kwangena ukuze kumbiwe futhi kwakhiwe izitimela.
Lokhu kuvame ukubizwa ngokuthi **iNguquko Yezimbiwa** eNingizimu Afrika.

slides.notes: Xhumanisa ngokusobala izingxenye ezimbili zalesi sihloko. Amandla afanayo aletha izimboni eBrithani - ukulambela izimpahla eziluhlaza, izimakethe nenzuzo - aphinda ayakha kabusha iNingizimu ye-Afrika. Ethula 'iNguquko Yezimbiwa' njengegama lasekhaya loshintsho olusheshayo lwezimboni eNingizimu Afrika, oluqhutshwa ukumbiwa kunezindwangu. Leli iphuzu eliphambili lesifundo.

slides.heading: Amadayimane nokumbiwa kweKimberley
slides.lead: Ukutholakala kwamadayimane kwaguqula isifunda esithule saba yidolobha lezimayini elichumayo cishe ngobusuku obubodwa.

blocks.text: Kusukela ngo-1867 amadayimane atholakala eduze kwemifula i-Orange ne-Vaal, futhi kwaqala ukugijima okukhulu eduze kwalokho okwaba **yiKimberley**. Izinkulungwane zababembi zamba umgodi odumile **iBig Hole (uMgodi Omkhulu)**. Ngo-1888 u-**Cecil John Rhodes** wahlanganisa izimayini ngaphansi kwenkampani yakhe, i-**De Beers Consolidated Mines**, wathola ukulawula iningi lokuhlinzekwa kwamadayimane emhlabeni.

items: IKimberley yakhula yaba elinye lamadolobha amakhulu eNingizimu ye-Afrika.
Ababembi abancane baxoshwa njengoba izinkampani ezinothile zithatha izintambo.
Abasebenzi abamnyama babehlaliswa emakhempu avaliwe futhi beholelwa okuncane kakhulu kunabasebenzi abamhlophe.

image.alt: Umgodi ojulile ovulekile wemayini onezitebhisi omile njengefanela, unezithombe ezincane phezulu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='40' width='220' height='24' fill='#b7a17a'/><path d='M10 64 L210 64 L150 150 L70 150 Z' fill='#6b5236'/><path d='M28 64 L192 64 L140 132 L80 132 Z' fill='#7a5f40'/><path d='M48 64 L172 64 L128 112 L92 112 Z' fill='#8a6d49'/><path d='M70 64 L150 64 L118 96 L102 96 Z' fill='#5a4630'/><g fill='#3f342a'><rect x='40' y='54' width='4' height='10'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='4' height='10'/><rect x='160' y='54' width='4' height='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: IKimberley iyisibonelo sokuqala esicacile seNguquko Yezimbiwa. Imibono emikhulu emibili: ukugijima kwadala idolobha elikhulu lezimboni ngaphakathi ezweni, futhi ukulawula kwadlulela ngokushesha kusuka kubabembi abancane abaningi kuya ezinkampanini ezimbalwa ezinamandla eziholwa u-Rhodes. Ethula uhlelo lwamakhempu nolwabasebenzi abafudukayo ngokunensa lapha; islaydi esilandelayo siyaluthuthukisa. [SME] Qinisekisa uhlaka lwe-Eureka (1867) uma kuqhathaniswa ne-Kimberley 'New Rush' (1871) uma izinsuku eziqondile zidingeka.

slides.heading: Igolide eWitwatersrand
slides.lead: Ukutholakala kwegolide ngo-1886 kwadala iJohannesburg (iGoli) futhi kwenza iNingizimu Afrika ibe semqoka emnothweni womhlaba.

blocks.text: Ngo-1886 umthapho omkhulu wegolide watholakala e-**Witwatersrand**, futhi idolobha lezimayini i-**Johannesburg** lavela phakathi nezinyanga ezimbalwa. Igolide lalilele phansi kakhulu ngaphansi komhlaba, ngakho ukulimba kwakudinga imishini ebizayo, izinkampani ezinkulu nezinombolo ezinkulu zabasebenzi.

items: IJohannesburg yaba yidolobha elikhula ngokushesha kunawo wonke eNingizimu ye-Afrika.
Ukumbiwa okujulile kwakudinga imali eningi, ngakho izindlu zezimayini zakhula zaba namandla kakhulu.
Igolide lenza iNingizimu Afrika ibe balulekile eBrithani nasemnothweni wonke womhlaba.

image.alt: Umbhoshongo omude wezinsimbi zenhloko yemayini onesondo elisonteka ngaphezu komgodi, negolide elingahluziwe ngezansi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='130' width='200' height='30' fill='#8c7a5c'/><path d='M70 130 L86 40 L114 40 L130 130 Z' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='78' y1='90' x2='122' y2='90' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='74' y1='60' x2='126' y2='60' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='40' r='14' fill='none' stroke='#3f342a' stroke-width='5'/><rect x='150' y='108' width='16' height='12' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='158' y='96' width='16' height='12' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qhathanisa amadayimane negolide. Amadayimane ekuqaleni ayengacoshwa emhlabeni; igolide leWitwatersrand lalijulile futhi lisezingeni eliphansi, ngakho kusukela ekuqaleni lalidinga imishini esindayo, imigodi ejulile nemali eningi. Yingakho izinkampani zezimayini ezinamandla nabasebenzi abaningi kakhulu bavela ngokushesha kangaka. IJohannesburg iyisibonelo esicacile kakhulu saseNingizimu Afrika sokuthuthela emadolobheni okuqhutshwa yizimboni.

slides.heading: Abasebenzi abafudukayo, amakhempu namadolobha amasha
slides.lead: Izimayini zakha kabusha ukuthi abantu baseNingizimu ye-Afrika babephila futhi besebenza kuphi nangayiphi indlela.

blocks.text: Izimayini zazidinga inqwaba yabasebenzi abashibhile. Amadoda amaningi amnyama ayehamba amabanga amade esuka emaphandleni eyosebenza ezimayini izinyanga ngesikhathi esisodwa - uhlelo lwa-**basebenzi abafudukayo** - kuyilapho imindeni yawo isele emuva. Abasebenzi babehlala **emakhempu** aminyene, beholelwa amaholo aphansi futhi bephoqeleka ukuphatha **amapasi** ayelawula ukuhamba kwabo.

items: Intela nokulahlekelwa umhlaba kwaphoqa amadoda amaningi asemaphandleni ukufuna umsebenzi wasemayini.
Ukwahlukaniswa ngokobuhlanga emiholweni nasezindlini kwakhiwa kwangena ohlelweni lwezimayini.
Le nhlanganisela yabasebenzi abafudukayo nokulawulwa ngokobuhlanga yakha iNingizimu Afrika isikhathi eside emva kuka-1900.

image.alt: Umugqa wezithombe zabasebenzi behamba beya ezakhiweni zemayini, bephethe amaqoqo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='124' width='240' height='36' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='70' height='64' fill='#6b5236'/><rect x='160' y='74' width='16' height='16' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='188' y='74' width='16' height='16' fill='#cdd6b5'/><g fill='#3f342a'><circle cx='34' cy='78' r='10'/><rect x='27' y='90' width='14' height='34'/><circle cx='70' cy='74' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='86' width='14' height='38'/><circle cx='106' cy='80' r='10'/><rect x='99' y='92' width='14' height='32'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='22' y='70' width='10' height='10'/><rect x='60' y='66' width='10' height='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi yislaydi esibucayi kakhulu - sethule ngamaqiniso nangokunakekela. Umnotho wezimbiwa awuzange nje udale umcebo namadolobha; wadala uhlelo lwabasebenzi abafudukayo, amakhempu, amaholo aphansi ngokobuhlanga nokulawulwa ngamapasi okwabangela ubunzima obungempela nokuhlukanisa imindeni. Yenza ukuxhumana nengxenye yaseBrithani: njengoba nje abasebenzi baseBrithani babhekana nezimo ezinzima nomphakathi ohlukene, umnotho wezimayini waseNingizimu Afrika wakhiqiza ukungalingani okujulile - lapha okwahlelwa ngokwemigqa yobuhlanga. Lokhu kuxhumana naphambili nezihloko zakamuva zokwehlukaniswa ngokobuhlanga (segregation) nobandlululo (apartheid).

slides.heading: Ukuqhathaniswa kweBrithani neNingizimu ye-Afrika
slides.lead: Amandla afanayo ezimboni akhiqiza izinguquko ezifanayo ezindaweni ezimbili ezihluke kakhulu.

items: Kwaqhutshwa yisitimu, amalahle nezimboni zezindwangu.
Amadolobha afana neManchester akhula ngokushesha.
Isigaba esimaphakathi esisha nesigaba sabasebenzi.
Kwaqhutshwa ukumbiwa kwamadayimane negolide.
Amadolobha afana neKimberley neJohannesburg akhula ngokushesha.
Abanikazi bezimayini abanothile nabasebenzi abafudukayo abahlukaniswe ngobuhlanga.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lesi slaydi esiseceleni ngeceleni ukukhipha ikhono le-CAPS lokuqhathanisa. Okufanayo: ukukhula okusheshayo kwezimboni, amadolobha akhula ngokushesha, ukwahlukana kwenhlalo okucacile phakathi kwabanikazi nabasebenzi. Umehluko obalulekile: eNingizimu Afrika lokho kwahlukana kwakuhlelwe ngokobuhlanga, futhi abasebenzi babefuduka kakhulu. Yenza abafundi baphakamise okufanayo okukodwa nomehluko owodwa ngamazwi abo ngaphambi kokuba wembule amakholomu.

slides.heading: Esikufundile
slides.lead: Isitimu nezimboni kwaguqula iBrithani; amadayimane negolide kwadonsa iNingizimu ye-Afrika kwangena emhlabeni ofanayo wezimboni.

blocks.text: INguquko Yezimboni yasusela umsebenzi ezimbonini eziqhutshwa yimishini, yagcwalisa amadolobha ngabantu, futhi yahlukanisa umphakathi waba ngabanikazi nabasebenzi. Isidingo saseBrithani sezimpahla nezimakethe, kanye nokutholakala kwa-**madayimane** ne-**golide**, kwaletha lolu shintsho olusheshayo lwezimboni eNingizimu ye-Afrika ngendlela ye-**Nguquko Yezimbiwa**.

blocks.question: Chaza ukuthi injini yesitimu yayiguqula kanjani indlela izimpahla ezazenziwa ngayo eBrithani.
Chaza izindlela ezimbili ukutholakala kwamadayimane negolide okwaguqula ngazo impilo eNingizimu ye-Afrika.
Nikeza indlela eyodwa ushintsho lwezimboni olwalufana ngayo eBrithani naseNingizimu ye-Afrika, nendlela eyodwa olwaluhluke ngayo.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubuyela embuzweni wesihloko: ushintsho eBrithani lwafinyelela kanjani eNingizimu ye-Afrika? Buyekeza uketshezi - isitimu nezimboni, ukuthuthela emadolobheni, ukwahlukana kwenhlalo, bese kuba amandla afanayo afika lapha ngokumbiwa. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela izitayela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe emithonjeni nezokubhala okwandisiwe. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi lesi sihloko sibeka isisekelo somsebenzi wakamuva wokunwetshwa kwamakoloni, iMpi YaseNingizimu Afrika nokwehlukaniswa ngokobuhlanga (segregation).
